metadata.description: Mneme — a self-improving cache + skill engine for Claude Code.

plugins.name: mneme
plugins.description: Two-tier memory for Claude Code: a lean Tier 1 cache injected into every chat, plus a Tier 2 wiki of ingested documents queried on demand — with auto-capture to a review inbox so nothing untrusted enters the cache silently. Commands: /mneme:remember, /mneme:recall (incl. --wiki), /mneme:status, /mneme:review, /mneme:lint, /mneme:ingest, /mneme:loop; plus an auto-discovered skill bay.
